purpose: Applies the part color (Similar) in model to drawing.
Option to Apply the part color in model
Option to apply main part color to assembly. (Helps in checking the welded parts)
Option to apply single color to all the parts
steps: Select the drawing in the document manager and run the tool.
Can run this tool to multiple drawings.
pd_benefits: Helps in checking when selected assembly option as it changes the color of all the parts welded to main part as a single color.
Easy to apply a single color (User Choice from the list) to all the parts
download_process: Once You purchase the tool, a link will be sent to your mail to download.
installation_process: Double click on the installation Package
System will show installed Tekla Versions on your system
Choose the version(s) to be installed.
Close the Application. (Do not Delete the File)
It will be queued for the installation when Tekla is open next time.
Application will be installed before opening the software.
Search for Model Color To Drawing under Application and Components.
Let the Application automate the manual process.
